Records.description: 4-loop traintrack integral involving a Calabi-Yau threefold. 4-loop traintrack with 13 massless propagators, 14 massless external legs grouped into 10 momenta. Finite and dual-conformally invariant in $d=4$. Involves weight-5 hyperlogarithms integrated over an irreducible smooth Calabi-Yau threefold, elliptically fibered over $\mathbb{P}^2$. Weierstrass coefficients $g_2(z_1,z_2)$ and $g_3(z_1,z_2)$ have degrees specified in Eq. (13). Verified to have trivial canonical sheaf using Macaulay2.
Records.location: Eq. (1), Sec. Calabi-Yaus at Higher Loops

Records.description: Traintrack family, traintrack_L4_massless-internal-offshell-external. Planar chain of L boxes (cells), massless internal lines. External legs at every vertex: 4 off-shell corners (distinct masses, the collapsed pairs of the paper's 2L+6 massless particles) + 2L-2 massless middle legs; L=1 is the four-mass box. The L-loop traintrack is a weight-(L+1) hyperlogarithm over a Calabi-Yau (L-1)-fold: L=1 is a box, L=2 elliptic, L=3 a K3 surface, L=4 a Calabi-Yau threefold.
